# onelogin_user_mapping (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a specific OneLogin User Mapping.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "onelogin_user_mapping" "example" {
  id = 12345
}

output "mapping_name" {
  value = data.onelogin_user_mapping.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The ID of the user mapping.

### Read-Only

- `actions` (Block List) The actions for this mapping. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--actions))
- `conditions` (Block List) The conditions for this mapping. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--conditions))
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the user mapping is enabled.
- `match` (String) Indicates how conditions are matched.
- `name` (String) The name of the user mapping.
- `position` (Number) The position in evaluation order.

<a id="nestedblock--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `value` (List of String)


<a id="nestedblock--conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `conditions`

Read-Only:

- `operator` (String)
- `source` (String)
- `value` (String)
